HoverPower.UI.Title: Mochi's Blue Scrubber
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.Close: Close this. You can also toggle it with hotkey H or click on the Game top-left icon.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.ResetOutline: Reset Outline color and alpha to the game default. District and specialized-industry borders also use this path, so if those lines get faint, raise Outline alpha or use Reset.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.OutlineSwatch: Click this swatch to open the vanilla color picker. District and specialized-industry borders also follow this color and alpha path in vanilla.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.ResetFill: Reset Fill to game defaults. Vanilla fill is 0% for normal building hover.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.FillOpacity: Opacity of the fill inside the hovered outline. 0% = no inner fill, 100% = fully visible fill.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.ResetGuidelines: Reset Guidelines to the default HoverPower level. Both this panel and Options menu slider stay in sync.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.GuidelinesOpacity: Guidelines opacity. Below 15% is not advised because the guides may become too hard to see.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.SurfaceToggle:
Hide Surface tool boundary preview lines.
Default hotkey: L.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.Reset: Reset Outline back to game defaults.
